mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pay (activityID, userID, payAmount, payStatus, payMethod, payTime, payRemark) VALUES (#{activityID}, #{userID}, #{payAmount}, #{payStatus}, #{payMethod}, #{payTime}, #{payRemark})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pay WHERE activityID = #{activityID} AND userID = #{userID} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM pay WHERE activityID = #{activityID} ORDER BY payID DESC
SELECT * FROM pay WHERE userID = #{userID} ORDER BY payID DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(payAmount), 0) FROM pay WHERE activityID = #{activityID} AND payStatus = '已支付'
